title: aira cespitosa subsp. media
intro: Aira cespitosa subsp. media, also known as the early meadow-grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Aira cespitosa subsp. media include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bloating, gas, and indigestion, as well as its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
